summary: Learning Dashboard and Review Queue features testing completed. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed (100%). Both new features are fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms Learning Dashboard and Review Queue features are properly implemented:
1. LearningDashboard.js: All required data-testid attributes present for testing
2. LearningDashboard.js: Properly fetches from /api/posting-patterns/learning-dashboard and displays all sections
4. ReviewQueuePage.js: All required data-testid attributes present for testing
5. ReviewQueuePage.js: Properly fetches from /api/posting-patterns/review-queue with filter support
6. ReviewQueuePage.js: Summary cards are clickable and switch between pending/approved/corrected/all views
7. ReviewQueuePage.js: CorrectionDialog component properly handles correction submissions
8. posting_patterns.py: /learning-dashboard endpoint (line 22) aggregates data from all learning subsystems
9. posting_patterns.py: /review-queue endpoint (line 162) returns auto-drafted PIs with proper filtering
10. posting_patterns.py: /review-queue/{doc_id}/approve endpoint (line 256) marks drafts as approved and creates positive feedback
11. posting_patterns.py: /review-queue/{doc_id}/correct endpoint (line 298) records corrections for learning
12. Layout.js: Both 'AI Learning' and 'Review Queue' nav items properly configured (lines 27-28)
13. App.js: Routes for /ai-learning and /review-queue properly defined (lines 52-53)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified, navigation works, refresh buttons work, filter cards work)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Learning Dashboard and Review Queue features fully tested. Key features verified: (1) GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-dashboard returns valid JSON with all required fields (summary, posting_template_confidence, vendor_learning_activity, label_correction_patterns, recent_learning_events, recent_corrections, auto_draft_by_vendor), (2) GET /api/posting-patterns/review-queue returns valid JSON with count, items, and summary (pending, approved, corrected, total), (3) Review queue filter cards work (pending/approved/corrected/all), (4) POST /api/posting-patterns/review-queue/fake-id/approve returns error for non-existent doc, (5) POST /api/posting-patterns/review-queue/fake-id/correct returns error for non-existent doc, (6) Frontend Learning Dashboard shows all sections with real label correction data (PO→SHIPMENT 9x, BOL→PO 1x), (7) Frontend Review Queue shows empty state correctly (no auto-drafted docs in preview), (8) Both pages have working refresh buttons, (9) Sidebar navigation shows both 'AI Learning' and 'Review Queue' links and they navigate correctly.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-dashboard - Returns 200 with all required fields - PASS
GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-dashboard - summary has 9 required integer fields - PASS
GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-dashboard - label_correction_patterns has real data with correct structure - PASS
GET /api/posting-patterns/review-queue - Returns 200 with count, items, summary - PASS
GET /api/posting-patterns/review-queue - summary has pending, approved, corrected, total - PASS
POST /api/posting-patterns/review-queue/fake-id/approve - Returns success=false, error='Document not found' - PASS
POST /api/posting-patterns/review-queue/fake-id/correct - Returns success=false, error='Document not found' - PASS
frontend_tests: Sidebar nav has 'AI Learning' link (data-testid='nav-ai-learning') - PASS
Sidebar nav has 'Review Queue' link (data-testid='nav-review-queue') - PASS
Review queue page container (data-testid='review-queue-page') present - PASS
Review queue refresh button (data-testid='refresh-review-btn') present - PASS
Review queue shows empty state (expected - no auto-drafted docs in preview) - PASS
Filter cards clickable (Pending, Approved, Corrected, Total) - PASS
Review queue refresh button click works - PASS

mocked_apis.note: BC credentials in preview are placeholder. Preview environment has no real BC data, so learning events and auto-drafted documents are empty (counts=0). But label_correction_patterns has real data (PO→SHIPMENT 9x, BOL→PO 1x). The review queue is empty since no BC auto-drafts exist in preview. Empty states render correctly.
